Localization.Description: An attempt to execute a query

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.id} could not execute a query of "{object.type}" type in database "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.application.account.id} tried to execute a query of "{object.type}" type in database "{object.path}" on host {event_src.host}
